questionHtml: Outline one method that can be used to investigate the function of different parts of the brain.
markschemeHtml:
Alternative 1:
a. fMRI;

b. scan detects changes in blood flow/oxygen in blood
OR
more active parts of brain receive more blood flow;

Alternative 2:
c. lesions/autopsy;

d. part of the brain damaged
OR
loss of function detected;

Alternative 3:
e. stimulation during open brain surgery;

f. reaction observed;

The “f” must be written for fMRI.

Description must relate to method named.

meta.title: Outline one method that can be used to investigate the function of different parts of the brain.
